nodes.name: 黑栗雕
nodes.summary: 黑栗雕（Black-and-chestnut eagle，学名 Spizaetus isidori），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。
nodes.shortSummary: 黑栗雕（學名：Spizaetus isidori）是鷹雕屬的一種猛禽。牠們分佈於阿根廷、玻利維亞、哥倫比亞、厄瓜多爾、祕魯和委內瑞拉一帶，棲息於亞熱帶或熱帶的潮濕山區。 參考資料

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |date=2022 |title=Main aerial top predator of the Andean Montane Forest copes with fragmentation, but may be paying a high cost |url=https://doi.org/10.1016/j.gecco.2022.e02174 |journal=Global Ecology and Conservation |volume=37 |article-number=e02174}} Unfortunately, the twin causes of habitat destruction and persecution have caused population declines and the black-and-chestnut eagle is considered to be an Endangered species by the IUCN
